note: EXAMPLE gold set for the subtopic classifier. Original items (NOT real exam questions). Held-out gold must stay OUT of any AI training/index; run tools/speedrun/leakage_scan.py over AI inputs.

items.question: A committee of 3 is chosen from 8 people. In how many ways can this be done?
Events A and B are independent. Given P(A) and P(B), find P(A and B).
A test is positive. Using Bayes' theorem and total probability, find the posterior probability of disease.
Find P(A given B) when P(A and B) and P(B) are known.
For a binomial random variable, compute the expected value and variance.
X is exponential with a given rate. Find the probability that X exceeds a value.
An insurance policy has an ordinary deductible. Find the expected claim payment.
Compute the covariance and correlation between two random variables.
For n iid variables, use the central limit theorem to approximate the probability the sample mean exceeds a value.
Given the cdf of iid variables, find the distribution of the maximum order statistic.
